[1] Jan Eliáš and Gianluca Cusatis. Homogenization of discrete mesoscale model of concrete for coupled mass transport and mechanics by asymptotic expansion. Journal of the Mechanics and Physics of Solids, 167:105010, 2022. [ bib | DOI ]
[2] Jan Eliáš, Hao Yin, and Gianluca Cusatis. Homogenization of discrete diffusion models by asymptotic expansion. International Journal for Numerical and Analytical Methods in Geomechanics, 46:3052--3073, 2022. [ bib | DOI ]
[3] John E. Bolander, Jan Eliáš, Gianluca Cusatis, and Kohei Nagai. Discrete mechanical models of concrete fracture. Engineering Fracture Mechanics, 257:108030, 2021. [ bib | DOI ]
[4] Jan Eliáš and Miroslav Vořechovský. Fracture in random quasibrittle media: I. Discrete mesoscale simulations of load capacity and fracture process zone. Engineering Fracture Mechanics, 235:107160, 2020. [ bib | DOI ]
[5] Jan Mašek, Josef Květoň, and Jan Eliáš. Adaptive discretization refinement for discrete models of coupled mechanics and mass transport in concrete. Construction and Building Materials, 395:132243, 2023. [ bib | DOI ]
[6] Jan Eliáš. Elastic properties of isotropic discrete systems: Connections between geometric structure and poisson’s ratio. International Journal of Solids and Structures, 191-192:254--263, 2020. [ bib | DOI ]
[7] Jia-Liang Le, Jan Eliáš, Anna Gorgogianni, Joshua Vievering, and Josef Květoň. Rate-dependent scaling of dynamic tensile strength of quasibrittle structures. Journal of Applied Mechanics - ASME, 85(2):021003, 2018. [ bib | DOI ]
[8] Jan Eliáš. Boundary layer effect on behavior of discrete models. Materials, 10:157, 2017. [ bib | DOI ]
[9] Jan Eliáš. Adaptive technique for discrete models of fracture. International Journal of Solids and Structures, 100--101:376--387, 2016. [ bib | DOI ]
